name: Atrium Ljungberg AB (publ)
summary: Atrium Ljungberg AB (publ) owns, develops, and manages real estate properties primarily in Sweden. The company operates through Properties, and Project and Construction Activities segments. Its property portfolio comprises office premises and retail spaces; house restaurants; residential units; and cultural and educational facilities. The company also undertakes various turnkey contracts and pure construction contract assignments for residential properties and offices. Its property portfolio comprises 67 properties with a total letting area of 1,087,000 square meters in the regions of Stockholm, Gothenburg, Malm√É¬∂, and Uppsala. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Nacka, Sweden.
